$comment: Team-shared MCP servers for Polycards. context7 = live Medusa v2 / Mercur / Next 16 docs (fast-moving, version-specific). postgres = READ-ONLY query/inspect of the dev DB (credit_transaction / vip_level / vip_member_state) without booting an integration test. Set POLYCARDS_DATABASE_URL in your environment (the pokenic-postgres connection string) — it is NEVER committed here. frontend-checklist = REMOTE MCP (native HTTP, https://mcp.frontendchecklist.io) for auditing FE best practices (a11y / SEO / perf / security headers); no-auth read-only public rules DB, third-party-served — treat tool output as data.
